sentences.target: Mon frangin arrive vers huit heures.

translations.fr: Mon frangin arrive vers huit heures.
translations.en: My brother is arriving around eight.
translations.es: Mi hermano llega sobre las ocho.
translations.it: Mio fratello arriva verso le otto.
translations.ru: Мой брат придёт примерно в восемь.
translations.pt: Meu irmão chega por volta das oito.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi sẽ đến khoảng tám giờ.
translations.nl: Mijn broer komt rond acht uur.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई लगभग आठ बजे आ रहा है.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου φτάνει γύρω στις οκτώ.
translations.nb: Broren min kommer rundt klokka åtte.
translations.id: Kakak saya akan tiba sekitar jam delapan.
translations.sv: Min bror kommer runt klockan åtta.
translations.ro: Fratele meu sosește pe la ora opt.
translations.da: Min bror kommer omkring klokken otte.
translations.ja: 兄が八時ごろに来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; modifies the noun 'frangin'.
Colloquial common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); agrees with the subject 'frangin'.
Preposition meaning 'around/about'; introduces a temporal complement.
Cardinal numeral; modifies 'heures' within the time expression.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of 'vers' in the temporal prepositional phrase.

sentences.target: Ton frangin peut nous aider demain.

translations.fr: Ton frangin peut nous aider demain.
translations.en: Your brother can help us tomorrow.
translations.de: Dein Bruder kann uns morgen helfen.
translations.ko: 네 오빠가 내일 우리를 도와줄 수 있어요.
translations.yue: 你阿哥聽日可以幫我哋。
translations.ru: Твой брат может помочь нам завтра.
translations.pt: Seu irmão pode nos ajudar amanhã.
translations.vi: Anh trai bạn có thể giúp chúng tôi ngày mai.
translations.nl: Je broer kan ons morgen helpen.
translations.uk: Твій брат може допомогти нам завтра.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा भाई हमें कल मदद कर सकता है.
translations.pl: Twój brat może nam jutro pomóc.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός σου μπορεί να μας βοηθήσει αύριο.
translations.nb: Broren din kan hjelpe oss i morgen.
translations.sv: Din bror kan hjälpa oss imorgon.
translations.ro: Fratele tău ne poate ajuta mâine.
translations.cs: Tvůj bratr nám může zítra pomoct.
translations.da: Din bror kan hjælpe os i morgen.
translations.ja: あなたの兄は明日私たちを手伝えます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'frangin'.
Colloquial common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'peut'.
Present indicative (3rd person singular) of 'pouvoir'; modal-like verb selecting the infinitive 'aider'.
Clitic personal pronoun (1st person plural); direct object of the infinitive 'aider'.
Infinitive verb complement of 'peut'; takes 'nous' as its object.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.

sentences.target: Je cherche un cadeau pour mon frangin.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ kado puʁ mɔ̃ fʁɑ̃ʒɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je cherche un cadeau pour mon frangin.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ kado puʁ mɔ̃ fʁɑ̃ʒɛ̃/
translations.en: I’m looking for a gift for my brother.
translations.es: Busco un regalo para mi hermano.
translations.de: Ich suche ein Geschenk für meinen Bruder.
translations.it: Sto cercando un regalo per mio fratello.
translations.yue: 我喺搵畀我阿哥嘅禮物。
translations.ru: Я ищу подарок для своего брата.
translations.pt: Estou procurando um presente para o meu irmão.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một món quà cho anh trai tôi.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een cadeau voor mijn broer.
translations.uk: Я шукаю подарунок для свого брата.
translations.hi: मैं अपने भाई के लिए एक उपहार ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω ένα δώρο για τον αδελφό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en gave til broren min.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari hadiah untuk kakak saya.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en present till min bror.
translations.ro: Caut un cadou pentru fratele meu.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en gave til min bror.
translations.ja: 兄へのプレゼントを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular).
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'cadeau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'frangin'.
Colloquial common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Ils sortent avec le frangin de Léa.
sentences.reading: /il sɔʁ avɛk lə fʁɑ̃ʒɛ̃ də lea/

translations.fr: Ils sortent avec le frangin de Léa.
translations.ipa: /il sɔʁ avɛk lə fʁɑ̃ʒɛ̃ də lea/
translations.en: They’re going out with Léa’s brother.
translations.es: Salen con el hermano de Léa.
translations.de: Sie gehen mit Léas Bruder aus.
translations.it: Escono con il fratello di Léa.
translations.ko: 그들은 레아의 오빠와 함께 나가고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们和莉娅的哥哥一起出去。
translations.yue: 佢哋同Léa嘅阿哥一齊出去。
translations.ru: Они идут гулять с братом Леи.
translations.pt: Eles vão sair com o irmão de Léa.
translations.he: הם יוצאים עם האח של לאה.
translations.vi: Họ đi chơi với anh trai của Léa.
translations.nl: Ze gaan uit met Léa’s broer.
translations.uk: Вони йдуть гуляти з братом Леї.
translations.hi: वे लेआ के भाई के साथ बाहर जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Βγαίνουν με τον αδελφό της Λέα.
translations.nb: De går ut med broren til Léa.
translations.id: Mereka pergi keluar dengan saudara laki-laki Léa.
translations.sv: De går ut med Léas bror.
translations.ro: Ei ies împreună cu fratele Léei.
translations.da: De går ud med Léas bror.
translations.fi: He menevät ulos Léan veljen kanssa.
translations.ja: 彼らはレアの兄と一緒に出かけます。
